raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Dr. Joaquin Arambula is requesting nearly $10 million to improve local police departments in Fresno County.",
    "The Firebaugh Police Department requires substantial repairs due to poor conditions of their current facility.",
    "The existing police department in Parlier was previously a senior center and preschool, and was never designed to function as a police department.",
    "Police personnel in Parlier have faced threats, including automatic weapons fire directed at their building.",
    "The current facility of the Orange Cove Police Department is approximately 2,800 square feet and is shared with the local fire protection district.",
    "The Selma Police Department intends to upgrade its communication systems, including an Emergency 911 system and a city-wide video-policing surveillance system."
  ]
}
```
